scope: Systematic ACL27 supplement visual audit for obvious clipping, bad scaling, incomplete figures, black tiles, and caption/image collisions
user_request: Continue systematically scanning the ACL supplement for other obvious occlusion, bad scaling, or incomplete figure display problems.
audit_method: Rendered all 45 supplement pages at 150 dpi.
Generated compact 45-page and three 15-page contact sheets for coarse scanning.
Opened candidate dense pages 22, 23, 24, 28, 31, 32, 33, 34, 35, 36, 37, 38, 42, and 44 at page scale.
Cross-checked PDF image inventory with pdfimages -list for obvious low-resolution or PDF-layer crop anomalies.

confirmed_defect.figure: Figure S30 / selected official navigation cases with divergent trajectories
confirmed_defect.root_cause: The selected6 navigation crop generator used a fixed y box that started inside the case03/case04 title rows. The standalone PNGs therefore already had clipped or missing top titles before LaTeX placed them.
confirmed_defect.before_symptom: Supplement page 32 showed only partial title strokes at the top of the first case panel.
confirmed_defect.fix: Moved the selected6 case03-case06 crop boxes upward to include the full case title rows and avoid carrying the next row title into the previous crop.

changes: Regenerated paper/shared/figures/supplement/internnav_selected6_case03.png and internnav_selected6_case04.png; case05/case06 were also regenerated for consistent future reuse.
Added a regression test requiring selected6 case crop titles to have a visible top margin instead of being clipped at y=0.
Rebuilt and re-rendered the supplement after the fix.

local_visual_review.reviewer: Codex local visual review using browser-visual-review and render-visual-reviewer paper figure protocols; no subagent spawned because this environment only permits spawn_agent when explicitly requested.
local_visual_review.final_verdict: PASS for this pass. No remaining obvious hard clipping, black padded tile, incomplete figure footer, or caption/image collision was found in the final 45-page contact-sheet scan.

candidate_pages_reviewed.22: PASS: GRScenes failure-taxonomy companion is dense but complete; red panels are source scene content.
candidate_pages_reviewed.23: PASS: PASS-only companion is complete and caption does not collide.
candidate_pages_reviewed.24: PASS: zoom-stress companion and audit strip are contained.
candidate_pages_reviewed.28: PASS: material decision map, render matrix, and visual decision gate are contained.
candidate_pages_reviewed.31: PASS: selected6 pair01 titles and panels are complete.
candidate_pages_reviewed.32: PASS after fix: selected6 pair02 case03/case04 titles are complete.
candidate_pages_reviewed.33: PASS: selected6 neutral companion panels are contained.
candidate_pages_reviewed.34: PASS: 0036/0066 asymmetric case page is complete.
candidate_pages_reviewed.35: PASS: 0036/0066 divergent case page is complete.
candidate_pages_reviewed.37: PASS: navigation media boundary strip remains dense but complete.
candidate_pages_reviewed.38: PASS: upload-gate closure card is contained.
candidate_pages_reviewed.42: PASS: review-packet contact sheet has no black padded tile recurrence.
candidate_pages_reviewed.44: PASS: source-boundary companion gate and source trays are contained.

local_visual_review.residual_caveat: Several supplement pages remain intentionally dense review indexes. This pass treats hard clipping, missing figure content, unreadable source title crops, black padded tiles, and figure/caption collision as blockers; it does not rewrite every dense index into a lower-density layout.

follow_up_risks: Dense review-index pages can still be improved editorially, but no obvious hard display failure remained in this scan.
Future crop generators should avoid fixed y boxes without title-margin regression checks.
